hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$HOOK_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then python3 -m py_compile "$FILE" 2>&1 && echo "✓ syntax ok: $FILE" || echo "✗ SYNTAX ERROR in $FILE"; fi

FILE=$(echo "$HOOK_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *".env" && "$FILE" != *".env.example"* ]]; then echo "Blocked: direct writes to .env are not allowed. Edit manually." >&2; exit 2; fi

cat /Users/ZacsMacBook/Documents/OperatorOS/.claude/compact-reminder.md 2>/dev/null || true; if [[ -f TASK.md ]]; then echo ''; echo '--- TASK BRIEF (from TASK.md) ---'; cat TASK.md; echo '--- END BRIEF ---'; fi
if [[ -f TASK.md ]]; then echo '--- TASK BRIEF ---'; cat TASK.md; echo '--- END BRIEF ---'; fi

cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" 2>/dev/null && git remote get-url upstream &>/dev/null 2>&1 && git fetch upstream --quiet 2>/dev/null && BEHIND=$(git rev-list HEAD..upstream/main --count 2>/dev/null || echo 0) && [ "$BEHIND" -gt 0 ] && echo "" && echo "OperatorOS update available ($BEHIND new commit(s)). Run: bash scripts/update.sh" && echo "" || true
